properties.name: CloudFirst
properties.activity: protection of systems, customer data, and operations

properties.description: No formal audit trail for all operations on production data
No ticketing workflow for security incidents reported on Slack

properties.name: Least Privilege
properties.requirement: Users are expected to have only the access necessary for their role

properties.name: Continuous Improvement
properties.requirement: Policies are revised 'as needed,' often after an issue arises

properties.description: MFA not enforced for all users
Password complexity not enforced on every third-party service
Shared credentials for internal services without full audit logging
No formal quarterly access review process
Root AWS credentials known by multiple individuals
No Just-In-Time or Privileged Access Management
GitHub, Slack, Google Workspace, and Stripe
used to deploy code or manage infrastructure
security incidents and system disruptions affecting service availability, confidentiality, or integrity

properties.name: Password complexity requirement
properties.requirement: at least 8 characters, including one uppercase letter and one digit

properties.name: Password change policy
properties.requirement: change at account creation, discretionary thereafter

properties.description: lack of automatic monitoring for password sharing practices

properties.name: audit interne des pratiques de mot de passe
politique centralisée de chiffrement des disques

properties.description: hosted on AWS and Google Cloud

properties.name: session de formation à la sécurité

properties.description: absence de test d’évaluation et suivi individuel
absence de procédure formelle de déclaration d’incident interne
limited security diligence due to resource constraints

properties.name: vendor selection criteria
properties.description: Vendors are selected primarily based on price, functionality, and ease of integration

properties.name: security questionnaires
properties.description: Security questionnaires are requested only for high-impact providers
